title: Florescent
description: Resource pack making flowers and foliage look more 3D
body: This resource pack aims to give Minecraft's vegetal and fungal life a newly refreshed, three-dimensional look. This includes but not limited to crops, flowers, mushrooms and saplings. # Connected Textures Some features in this resource pack are dependent on connected and emmisive textures. It is recommended to use either [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads), or a mod which uses the OptiFine connected textures format, like [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity). Note that this is entirely optional. Without connected or emmisive textures enabled, the resource pack will still look fine.
